displayTitle: Dawn of the Jedi: Force War #4
synopsis: Xesh and his Rakatan master are leading their ravening army to the temple of Anil Kesh and the chasm below—hoping to find a gateway to the galaxy at the bottom! But Je'daii Shae Koda dogs Xesh's steps, hoping to bring her lover back to the light side of the Force!
title: Dawn of the Jedi: Force War #4
